title: triticum creticum
intro: Triticum creticum, also known as Crete wheat or emmer wheat, is an ancient type of wheat that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, and is also believed to have antiviral and antibacterial properties. Triticum creticum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
